tEn: Transformers are RNNs: Fast Autoregressive Transformers with Linear Attention
tZh: Transformer是RNN：具有线性注意力的快速自回归Transformer
sEn: Transformers can be reformulated as linear dot-products of kernel feature maps, reducing complexity from O(N^2) to O(N) and enabling iterative computation akin to RNNs.
sZh: Transformer可通过核特征映射的线性点积重新表述，将复杂度从O(N²)降至O(N)，并实现类似RNN的迭代计算。
absEn: Transformers achieve remarkable performance in several tasks but due to their quadratic complexity, with respect to the input's length, they are prohibitively slow for very long sequences. To address this limitation, we express the self-attention as a linear dot-product of kernel feature maps and make use of the associativity property of matrix products to reduce the complexity from $\mathcal{O}\left(N^2\right)$ to $\mathcal{O}\left(N\right)$, where $N$ is the sequence length. We show that this formulation permits an iterative implementation that dramatically accelerates autoregressive transformers and reveals their relationship to recurrent neural networks. Our linear transformers achieve similar performance to vanilla transformers and they are up to 4000x faster on autoregressive prediction of very long sequences.
absZh: Transformer在多项任务中表现出色，但由于其相对于输入长度的二次复杂度，处理极长序列时速度极慢。为解决这一局限，我们将自注意力表示为核特征映射的线性点积，并利用矩阵乘积的结合性，将复杂度从O(N²)降至O(N)，其中N为序列长度。我们证明，这种公式允许迭代实现，从而大幅加速自回归Transformer，并揭示其与递归神经网络的联系。我们的线性Transformer性能与原始Transformer相当，且在极长序列的自回归预测中速度提升高达4000倍。

contrib.en: Proposes linear attention via kernel feature maps, reducing complexity from O(N^2) to O(N).
contrib.zh: 提出通过核特征图实现线性注意力，将复杂度从 O(N^2) 降至 O(N)。

contrib.en: Derives causal masking with linear time and constant memory for autoregressive transformers.
contrib.zh: 推导出自回归 Transformer 的因果掩码，实现线性时间和恒定内存。

contrib.en: Reveals transformers as recurrent neural networks, enabling constant-time inference per step.
contrib.zh: 揭示 Transformer 可视为循环神经网络，实现每步恒定时间推理。

contrib.en: Achieves up to 4000x faster autoregressive inference on long sequences with comparable performance.
contrib.zh: 在长序列自回归推理上实现高达 4000 倍加速，性能与原始 Transformer 相当。

contrib.en: Provides constant-memory gradient computation for causal linear attention via cumulative sums.
contrib.zh: 通过累积和提供因果线性注意力的恒定内存梯度计算。

contrib.en: Validates on image generation and speech recognition, showing linear scaling and competitive accuracy.
contrib.zh: 在图像生成和语音识别上验证，展示线性缩放和竞争性精度。

limits.en: Feature map choice (e.g., elu) may not match softmax attention in all tasks.
limits.zh: 特征图选择（如 elu）可能在某些任务中不如 softmax 注意力。

limits.en: Linear attention requires finite-dimensional feature maps, limiting exact softmax approximation.
limits.zh: 线性注意力需要有限维特征图，限制了精确 softmax 近似。

limits.en: Performance on very short sequences may not benefit from linear complexity due to overhead.
limits.zh: 在极短序列上，线性复杂度的优势可能因开销而不明显。

limits.en: The method assumes non-negative similarity functions, which may restrict attention expressiveness.
limits.zh: 该方法假设非负相似性函数，可能限制注意力的表达能力。

limits.en: Empirical evaluation is limited to image and speech domains; generalizability to other tasks is unverified.
limits.zh: 实证评估仅限于图像和语音领域，对其他任务的泛化性未验证。

items.en: Transformers are RNNs: Fast Autoregressive Transformers with Linear Attention
items.zh: Transformer 是 RNN：具有线性注意力的快速自回归 Transformer

items.en: Transformers achieve remarkable performance in several tasks but due to their quadratic complexity, with respect to the input’s length, they are prohibitively slow for very long sequences. To address this limitation, we express the self-attention as a linear dot-product of kernel feature maps and make use of the associativity property of matrix products to reduce the complexity from 𝒪​(N2)𝒪superscript𝑁2\mathcal{O}\left(N^{2}\right) to 𝒪​(N)𝒪𝑁\mathcal{O}\left(N\right), where N𝑁N is the sequence length. We show that this formulation permits an iterative implementation that dramatically accelerates autoregressive transformers and reveals their relationship to recurrent neural networks. Our linear transformers achieve similar performance to vanilla transformers and they are up to 4000x faster on autoregressive prediction of very long sequences.
items.zh: Transformer 在多个任务中取得了显著性能，但由于其相对于输入长度的二次复杂度，对于非常长的序列来说速度过慢。为了解决这一限制，我们将自注意力表示为核特征图的线性点积，并利用矩阵乘积的结合性，将复杂度从 O(N²) 降低到 O(N)，其中 N 是序列长度。我们表明，这种公式允许迭代实现，从而显著加速自回归 Transformer，并揭示了它们与循环神经网络的关系。我们的线性 Transformer 实现了与普通 Transformer 相似的性能，并且在自回归预测非常长序列时速度提高了 4000 倍。

items.en: Transformer models were originally introduced by Vaswani et al. (2017) in the context of neural machine translation Sutskever et al. (2014); Bahdanau et al. (2015) and have demonstrated impressive results on a variety of tasks dealing with natural language Devlin et al. (2019), audio Sperber et al. (2018), and images Parmar et al. (2019). Apart from tasks with ample supervision, transformers are also effective in transferring knowledge to tasks with limited or no supervision when they are pretrained with autoregressive Radford et al. (2018; 2019) or masked language modeling objectives Devlin et al. (2019); Yang et al. (2019); Song et al. (2019); Liu et al. (2020).
items.zh: Transformer 模型最初由 Vaswani 等人（2017）在神经机器翻译的背景下引入，并在处理自然语言、音频和图像的各种任务中展示了令人印象深刻的结果。除了有充分监督的任务外，当使用自回归或掩码语言建模目标进行预训练时，Transformer 在将知识迁移到有限或无监督的任务上也有效。

items.en: However, these benefits often come with a very high computational and memory cost. The bottleneck is mainly caused by the global receptive field of self-attention, which processes contexts of N𝑁N inputs with a quadratic memory and time complexity 𝒪​(N2)𝒪superscript𝑁2\mathcal{O}\left(N^{2}\right). As a result, in practice transformers are slow to train and their context is limited. This disrupts temporal coherence and hinders the capturing of long-term dependencies. Dai et al. (2019) addressed the latter by attending to memories from previous contexts albeit at the expense of computational efficiency.
items.zh: 然而，这些优势通常伴随着非常高的计算和内存成本。瓶颈主要由自注意力的全局感受野引起，它以二次内存和时间复杂度 O(N²) 处理 N 个输入的上下文。因此，在实践中，Transformer 训练缓慢且上下文受限。这破坏了时间连贯性并阻碍了长期依赖的捕获。Dai 等人（2019）通过关注先前上下文中的记忆来解决后者，但牺牲了计算效率。

items.en: Lately, researchers shifted their attention to approaches that increase the context length without sacrificing efficiency. Towards this end, Child et al. (2019) introduced sparse factorizations of the attention matrix to reduce the self-attention complexity to 𝒪​(N​N)𝒪𝑁𝑁\mathcal{O}\left(N\sqrt{N}\right). Kitaev et al. (2020) further reduced the complexity to 𝒪​(N​log⁡N)𝒪𝑁𝑁\mathcal{O}\left(N\log N\right) using locality-sensitive hashing. This made scaling to long sequences possible. Even though the aforementioned models can be efficiently trained on large sequences, they do not speed-up autoregressive inference.
items.zh: 最近，研究人员将注意力转向了在不牺牲效率的情况下增加上下文长度的方法。为此，Child 等人（2019）引入了注意力矩阵的稀疏分解，将自注意力复杂度降低到 O(N√N)。Kitaev 等人（2020）使用局部敏感哈希进一步将复杂度降低到 O(N log N)。这使得扩展到长序列成为可能。尽管上述模型可以在大序列上高效训练，但它们并未加速自回归推理。

items.en: In this paper, we introduce the linear transformer model that significantly reduces the memory footprint and scales linearly with respect to the context length. We achieve this by using a kernel-based formulation of self-attention and the associative property of matrix products to calculate the self-attention weights (§ 3.2). Using our linear formulation, we also express causal masking with linear complexity and constant memory (§ 3.3). This reveals the relation between transformers and RNNs, which enables us to perform autoregressive inference orders of magnitude faster (§ 3.4).
items.zh: 在本文中，我们引入了线性 Transformer 模型，该模型显著减少了内存占用，并相对于上下文长度线性扩展。我们通过使用基于核的自注意力公式和矩阵乘积的结合性来计算自注意力权重来实现这一点。使用我们的线性公式，我们还以线性复杂度和恒定内存表达了因果掩码。这揭示了 Transformer 和 RNN 之间的关系，使我们能够以数量级的速度执行自回归推理。

items.en: Our evaluation on image generation and automatic speech recognition demonstrates that linear transformer can reach the performance levels of transformer, while being up to three orders of magnitude faster during inference.
items.zh: 我们在图像生成和自动语音识别上的评估表明，线性 Transformer 可以达到 Transformer 的性能水平，同时在推理期间速度提高多达三个数量级。

items.en: In this section, we provide an overview of the most relevant works that seek to address the large memory and computational requirements of transformers. Furthermore, we discuss methods that theoretically analyze the core component of the transformer model, namely self-attention. Finally, we present another line of work that seeks to alleviate the softmax bottleneck in the attention computation.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们概述了旨在解决 Transformer 大内存和计算需求的最相关工作。此外，我们讨论了从理论上分析 Transformer 模型核心组件（即自注意力）的方法。最后，我们介绍了另一条旨在缓解注意力计算中 softmax 瓶颈的工作线。

items.en: Existing works seek to improve memory efficiency in transformers through weight pruning Michel et al. (2019), weight factorization Lan et al. (2020), weight quantization Zafrir et al. (2019) or knowledge distillation. Clark et al. (2020) proposed a new pretraining objective called replaced token detection that is more sample efficient and reduces the overall computation. Lample et al. (2019) used product-key attention to increase the capacity of any layer with negligible computational overhead.
items.zh: 现有工作试图通过权重剪枝、权重分解、权重量化或知识蒸馏来提高 Transformer 的内存效率。Clark 等人（2020）提出了一种称为替换词检测的新预训练目标，该目标样本效率更高并减少了总体计算量。Lample 等人（2019）使用乘积键注意力以可忽略的计算开销增加了任何层的容量。

items.en: Reducing the memory or computational requirements with these methods leads to training or inference time speedups, but, fundamentally, the time complexity is still quadratic with respect to the sequence length which hinders scaling to long sequences. In contrast, we show that our method reduces both memory and time complexity of transformers both theoretically (§ 3.2) and empirically (§ 4.1).
items.zh: 使用这些方法减少内存或计算需求可以带来训练或推理时间的加速，但根本上，时间复杂度相对于序列长度仍然是二次的，这阻碍了向长序列的扩展。相比之下，我们表明我们的方法在理论上和实证上都降低了 Transformer 的内存和时间复杂度。

items.en: Another line of research aims at increasing the “context” of self-attention in transformers. Context refers to the maximum part of the sequence that is used for computing self-attention. Dai et al. (2019) introduced Transformer-XL which achieves state-of-the-art in language modeling by learning dependencies beyond a fixed length context without disrupting the temporal coherence. However, maintaining previous contexts in memory introduces significant additional computational cost. In contrast, Sukhbaatar et al. (2019) extended the context length significantly by learning the optimal attention span per attention head, while maintaining control over the memory footprint and computation time. Note that both approaches have the same asymptotic complexity as the vanilla model. In contrast, we improve the asymptotic complexity of the self-attention, which allows us to use significantly larger context.
items.zh: 另一条研究线旨在增加 Transformer 中自注意力的“上下文”。上下文是指用于计算自注意力的序列的最大部分。Dai 等人（2019）引入了 Transformer-XL，它通过学习超出固定长度上下文的依赖关系而不破坏时间连贯性，在语言建模中达到了最先进水平。然而，在内存中维护先前的上下文会引入显著额外的计算成本。相比之下，Sukhbaatar 等人（2019）通过学习每个注意力头的最优注意力跨度，同时控制内存占用和计算时间，显著扩展了上下文长度。注意，这两种方法都具有与普通模型相同的渐近复杂度。相比之下，我们改进了自注意力的渐近复杂度，这使我们能够使用显著更大的上下文。

items.en: More related to our model are the works of Child et al. (2019) and Kitaev et al. (2020). The former Child et al. (2019) introduced sparse factorizations of the attention matrix reducing the overall complexity from quadratic to 𝒪​(N​N)𝒪𝑁𝑁\mathcal{O}\left(N\sqrt{N}\right) for generative modeling of long sequences. More recently, Kitaev et al. (2020) proposed Reformer. This method further reduces complexity to 𝒪​(N​log⁡N)𝒪𝑁𝑁\mathcal{O}\left(N\log{N}\right) by using locality-sensitive hashing (LSH) to perform fewer dot products. Note that in order to be able to use LSH, Reformer constrains the keys, for the attention, to be identical to the queries. As a result this method cannot be used for decoding tasks where the keys need to be different from the queries. In comparison, linear transformers impose no constraints on the queries and keys and scale linearly with respect to the sequence length. Furthermore, they can be used to perform inference in autoregressive tasks three orders of magnitude faster, achieving comparable performance in terms of validation perplexity.
items.zh: 与我们的模型更相关的是 Child 等人（2019）和 Kitaev 等人（2020）的工作。前者引入了注意力矩阵的稀疏分解，将长序列生成建模的整体复杂度从二次降低到 O(N√N)。最近，Kitaev 等人（2020）提出了 Reformer。该方法通过使用局部敏感哈希执行更少的点积，进一步将复杂度降低到 O(N log N)。注意，为了能够使用 LSH，Reformer 约束注意力中的键必须与查询相同。因此，该方法不能用于键需要与查询不同的解码任务。相比之下，线性 Transformer 对查询和键没有约束，并且相对于序列长度线性扩展。此外，它们可以用于在自回归任务中以三个数量级的速度执行推理，在验证困惑度方面达到可比的性能。

items.en: There have been few efforts to better understand self-attention from a theoretical perspective. Tsai et al. (2019) proposed a kernel-based formulation of attention in transformers which considers attention as applying a kernel smoother over the inputs with the kernel scores being the similarity between inputs. This formulation provides a better way to understand attention components and integrate the positional embedding. In contrast, we use the kernel formulation to speed up the calculation of self-attention and lower its computational complexity. Also, we observe that if a kernel with positive similarity scores is applied on the queries and keys, linear attention converges normally.
items.zh: 很少有工作从理论角度更好地理解自注意力。Tsai 等人（2019）提出了一种基于核的 Transformer 注意力公式，该公式将注意力视为在输入上应用核平滑器，核分数是输入之间的相似度。该公式提供了更好的方式来理解注意力组件并集成位置嵌入。相比之下，我们使用核公式来加速自注意力的计算并降低其计算复杂度。此外，我们观察到，如果对查询和键应用具有正相似度分数的核，线性注意力会正常收敛。

items.en: More recently, Cordonnier et al. (2020) provided theoretical proofs and empirical evidence that a multi-head self-attention with sufficient number of heads can express any convolutional layer. Here, we instead show that a self-attention layer trained with an autoregressive objective can be seen as a recurrent neural network and this observation can be used to significantly speed up inference time of autoregressive transformer models.
items.zh: 最近，Cordonnier 等人（2020）提供了理论证明和实证证据，表明具有足够数量头的多头自注意力可以表达任何卷积层。在这里，我们反而表明，使用自回归目标训练的自注意力层可以被视为循环神经网络，并且这一观察可用于显著加速自回归 Transformer 模型的推理时间。

items.en: For many years, softmax has been the bottleneck for training classification models with a large number of categories Goodman (2001); Morin & Bengio (2005); Mnih & Hinton (2009). Recent works Blanc & Rendle (2017); Rawat et al. (2019), have approximated softmax with a linear dot product of feature maps to speed up the training through sampling. Inspired from these works, we linearize the softmax attention in transformers. Concurrently with this work, Shen et al. (2020) explored the use of linearized attention for the task of object detection in images. In comparison, we do not only linearize the attention computation, but also develop an autoregressive transformer model with linear complexity and constant memory for both inference and training. Moreover, we show that through the lens of kernels, every transformer can be seen as a recurrent neural network.
items.zh: 多年来，softmax 一直是训练具有大量类别的分类模型的瓶颈。最近的工作通过采样使用特征图的线性点积来近似 softmax，以加速训练。受这些工作的启发，我们线性化了 Transformer 中的 softmax 注意力。与本文同时，Shen 等人（2020）探索了使用线性化注意力进行图像中的目标检测任务。相比之下，我们不仅线性化了注意力计算，还开发了一种具有线性复杂度和恒定内存的自回归 Transformer 模型，用于推理和训练。此外，我们表明，通过核的视角，每个 Transformer 都可以被视为一个循环神经网络。

items.en: In this section, we formalize our proposed linear transformer. We present that changing the attention from the traditional softmax attention to a feature map based dot product attention results in better time and memory complexity as well as a causal model that can perform sequence generation in linear time, similar to a recurrent neural network.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们形式化我们提出的线性 Transformer。我们提出，将注意力从传统的 softmax 注意力改为基于特征图的点积注意力，可以在时间和内存复杂度上获得更好的性能，并且得到一个因果模型，该模型可以像循环神经网络一样以线性时间进行序列生成。

items.en: Initially, in § 3.1, we introduce a formulation for the transformer architecture introduced in Vaswani et al. (2017). Subsequently, in § 3.2 and § 3.3 we present our proposed linear transformer and finally, in § 3.4 we rewrite the transformer as a recurrent neural network.
items.zh: 首先，在 3.1 节中，我们介绍了 Vaswani 等人（2017）引入的 Transformer 架构的公式。随后，在 3.2 和 3.3 节中，我们提出了我们提出的线性 Transformer，最后，在 3.4 节中，我们将 Transformer 重写为循环神经网络。

items.en: Let x∈ℝN×F𝑥superscriptℝ𝑁𝐹x\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times F} denote a sequence of N𝑁N feature vectors of dimensions F𝐹F. A transformer is a function T:ℝN×F→ℝN×F:𝑇→superscriptℝ𝑁𝐹superscriptℝ𝑁𝐹T:\mathbb{R}^{N\times F}\to\mathbb{R}^{N\times F} defined by the composition of L𝐿L transformer layers T1​(⋅),…,TL​(⋅)subscript𝑇1⋅…subscript𝑇𝐿⋅T_{1}(\cdot),\dots,T_{L}(\cdot) as follows,
items.zh: 令 x ∈ ℝ^{N×F} 表示一个由 N 个维度为 F 的特征向量组成的序列。Transformer 是一个函数 T: ℝ^{N×F} → ℝ^{N×F}，由 L 个 Transformer 层 T₁(·), …, T_L(·) 的复合定义如下：

items.en: The function fl​(⋅)subscript𝑓𝑙⋅f_{l}(\cdot) transforms each feature independently of the others and is usually implemented with a small two-layer feedforward network. Al​(⋅)subscript𝐴𝑙⋅A_{l}(\cdot) is the self attention function and is the only part of the transformer that acts across sequences.
items.zh: 函数 f_l(·) 独立地变换每个特征，通常由一个小的两层前馈网络实现。A_l(·) 是自注意力函数，是 Transformer 中唯一跨序列操作的部分。

items.en: The self attention function Al​(⋅)subscript𝐴𝑙⋅A_{l}(\cdot) computes, for every position, a weighted average of the feature representations of all other positions with a weight proportional to a similarity score between the representations. Formally, the input sequence x𝑥x is projected by three matrices WQ∈ℝF×Dsubscript𝑊𝑄superscriptℝ𝐹𝐷W_{Q}\in\mathbb{R}^{F\times D}, WK∈ℝF×Dsubscript𝑊𝐾superscriptℝ𝐹𝐷W_{K}\in\mathbb{R}^{F\times D} and WV∈ℝF×Msubscript𝑊𝑉superscriptℝ𝐹𝑀W_{V}\in\mathbb{R}^{F\times M} to corresponding representations Q𝑄Q, K𝐾K and V𝑉V. The output for all positions, Al​(x)=V′subscript𝐴𝑙𝑥superscript𝑉′A_{l}(x)=V^{\prime}, is computed as follows,
items.zh: 自注意力函数 Al(·) 对每个位置计算所有其他位置特征表示的加权平均，权重与表示之间的相似度分数成正比。形式上，输入序列 x 通过三个矩阵 WQ ∈ ℝ^(F×D)、WK ∈ ℝ^(F×D) 和 WV ∈ ℝ^(F×M) 投影到对应的表示 Q、K 和 V。所有位置的输出 Al(x) = V' 计算如下：

items.en: Note that in the previous equation, the softmax function is applied rowwise to Q​KT𝑄superscript𝐾𝑇QK^{T}. Following common terminology, the Q𝑄Q, K𝐾K and V𝑉V are referred to as the “queries”, “keys” and “values” respectively.
items.zh: 注意，在前一个方程中，softmax 函数按行应用于 QK^T。按照常见术语，Q、K 和 V 分别称为“查询”、“键”和“值”。

items.en: Equation 2 implements a specific form of self-attention called softmax attention where the similarity score is the exponential of the dot product between a query and a key. Given that subscripting a matrix with i𝑖i returns the i𝑖i-th row as a vector, we can write a generalized attention equation for any similarity function as follows,
items.zh: 方程 2 实现了一种特定形式的自注意力，称为 softmax 注意力，其中相似度分数是查询和键之间点积的指数。给定用 i 下标矩阵返回第 i 行作为向量，我们可以为任意相似度函数写出广义注意力方程如下：

items.en: Equation 3 is equivalent to equation 2 if we substitute the similarity function with sim​(q,k)=exp⁡(qT​kD)sim𝑞𝑘superscript𝑞𝑇𝑘𝐷\text{sim}\left(q,k\right)=\exp\left(\frac{q^{T}k}{\sqrt{D}}\right).
items.zh: 如果我们将相似度函数替换为 sim(q,k) = exp(q^T k / √D)，则方程 3 等价于方程 2。

items.en: The definition of attention in equation 2 is generic and can be used to define several other attention implementations such as polynomial attention or RBF kernel attention Tsai et al. (2019). Note that the only constraint we need to impose to sim​(⋅)sim⋅\text{sim}\left(\cdot\right), in order for equation 3 to define an attention function, is to be non-negative. This includes all kernels k​(x,y):ℝ2×F→ℝ+:𝑘𝑥𝑦→superscriptℝ2𝐹subscriptℝk(x,y):\mathbb{R}^{2\times F}\to\mathbb{R}_{+}.
items.zh: 方程 2 中的注意力定义是通用的，可用于定义其他几种注意力实现，例如多项式注意力或 RBF 核注意力 (Tsai et al., 2019)。注意，为了使方程 3 定义注意力函数，我们需要对 sim(·) 施加的唯一约束是非负性。这包括所有核 k(x,y): ℝ^(2×F) → ℝ_+。

items.en: Given such a kernel with a feature representation ϕ​(x)italic-ϕ𝑥\phi\left(x\right) we can rewrite equation 2 as follows,
items.zh: 给定这样一个具有特征表示 φ(x) 的核，我们可以将方程 2 重写如下：

items.en: and then further simplify it by making use of the associative property of matrix multiplication to
items.zh: 然后利用矩阵乘法的结合性质进一步简化为：

items.en: The above equation is simpler to follow when the numerator is written in vectorized form as follows,
items.zh: 当分子以向量化形式写出时，上述方程更容易理解如下：

items.en: Note that the feature map ϕ​(⋅)italic-ϕ⋅\phi\left(\cdot\right) is applied rowwise to the matrices Q𝑄Q and K𝐾K.
items.zh: 注意，特征映射 φ(·) 按行应用于矩阵 Q 和 K。

items.en: From equation 2, it is evident that the computational cost of softmax attention scales with 𝒪​(N2)𝒪superscript𝑁2\mathcal{O}\left(N^{2}\right), where N𝑁N represents the sequence length. The same is true for the memory requirements because the full attention matrix must be stored to compute the gradients with respect to the queries, keys and values. In contrast, our proposed linear transformer from equation 5 has time and memory complexity 𝒪​(N)𝒪𝑁\mathcal{O}\left(N\right) because we can compute ∑j=1Nϕ​(Kj)​VjTsuperscriptsubscript𝑗1𝑁italic-ϕsubscript𝐾𝑗superscriptsubscript𝑉𝑗𝑇\sum_{j=1}^{N}\phi\left(K_{j}\right)V_{j}^{T} and ∑j=1Nϕ​(Kj)superscriptsubscript𝑗1𝑁italic-ϕsubscript𝐾𝑗\sum_{j=1}^{N}\phi\left(K_{j}\right) once and reuse them for every query.
items.zh: 从方程 2 可以明显看出，softmax 注意力的计算成本随 O(N^2) 缩放，其中 N 表示序列长度。内存需求也是如此，因为必须存储完整的注意力矩阵才能计算关于查询、键和值的梯度。相比之下，我们提出的来自方程 5 的线性 Transformer 具有时间和内存复杂度 O(N)，因为我们可以一次性计算 ∑_{j=1}^N φ(K_j) V_j^T 和 ∑_{j=1}^N φ(K_j)，并对每个查询重复使用它们。

items.en: For softmax attention, the total cost in terms of multiplications and additions scales as 𝒪​(N2​max⁡(D,M))𝒪superscript𝑁2𝐷𝑀\mathcal{O}\left(N^{2}\max\left(D,M\right)\right), where D𝐷D is the dimensionality of the queries and keys and M𝑀M is the dimensionality of the values. On the contrary, for linear attention, we first compute the feature maps of dimensionality C𝐶C. Subsequently, computing the new values requires 𝒪​(N​C​M)𝒪𝑁𝐶𝑀\mathcal{O}\left(NCM\right) additions and multiplications.
items.zh: 对于 softmax 注意力，乘法和加法方面的总成本为 O(N^2 max(D,M))，其中 D 是查询和键的维度，M 是值的维度。相反，对于线性注意力，我们首先计算维度为 C 的特征映射。随后，计算新值需要 O(N C M) 次加法和乘法。

items.en: The previous analysis does not take into account the choice of kernel and feature function. Note that the feature function that corresponds to the exponential kernel is infinite dimensional, which makes the linearization of exact softmax attention infeasible. On the other hand, the polynomial kernel, for example, has an exact finite dimensional feature map and has been shown to work equally well with the exponential or RBF kernel Tsai et al. (2019). The computational cost for a linearized polynomial transformer of degree 2 is 𝒪​(N​D2​M)𝒪𝑁superscript𝐷2𝑀\mathcal{O}\left(ND^{2}M\right). This makes the computational complexity favorable when N>D2𝑁superscript𝐷2N>D^{2}. Note that this is true in practice since we want to be able to process sequences with tens of thousands of elements.
items.zh: 前面的分析没有考虑核和特征函数的选择。注意，对应于指数核的特征函数是无限维的，这使得精确 softmax 注意力的线性化不可行。另一方面，多项式核具有精确的有限维特征映射，并且已被证明与指数核或 RBF 核 (Tsai et al., 2019) 同样有效。2 次线性化多项式 Transformer 的计算成本为 O(N D^2 M)。这使得当 N > D^2 时计算复杂度有利。注意，这在实践中是成立的，因为我们希望能够处理具有数万个元素的序列。

items.en: For our experiments, that deal with smaller sequences, we employ a feature map that results in a positive similarity function as defined below,
items.zh: 对于处理较小序列的实验，我们采用一个产生正相似度函数的特征映射，定义如下：

items.en: where elu​(⋅)elu⋅\text{elu}(\cdot) denotes the exponential linear unit Clevert et al. (2015) activation function. We prefer elu​(⋅)elu⋅\text{elu}(\cdot) over relu​(⋅)relu⋅\text{relu}(\cdot) to avoid setting the gradients to 0 when x𝑥x is negative. This feature map results in an attention function that requires 𝒪​(N​D​M)𝒪𝑁𝐷𝑀\mathcal{O}\left(NDM\right) multiplications and additions. In our experimental section, we show that the feature map of equation 7 performs on par to the full transformer, while significantly reducing the computational and memory requirements.
items.zh: 其中 elu(·) 表示指数线性单元 (Clevert et al., 2015) 激活函数。我们更倾向于使用 elu(·) 而不是 relu(·)，以避免当 x 为负时梯度设置为 0。该特征映射产生的注意力函数需要 O(N D M) 次乘法和加法。在我们的实验部分，我们展示了方程 7 的特征映射在性能上与完整 Transformer 相当，同时显著降低了计算和内存需求。

items.en: The transformer architecture can be used to efficiently train autoregressive models by masking the attention computation such that the i𝑖i-th position can only be influenced by a position j𝑗j if and only if j≤i𝑗𝑖j\leq i, namely a position cannot be influenced by the subsequent positions. Formally, this causal masking changes equation 3 as follows,
items.zh: Transformer 架构可以通过掩码注意力计算来高效训练自回归模型，使得第 i 个位置只能被位置 j 影响当且仅当 j ≤ i，即一个位置不能被后续位置影响。形式上，这种因果掩码将方程 3 修改如下：

items.en: Following the reasoning of § 3.2, we linearize the masked attention as described below,
items.zh: 遵循 §3.2 的推理，我们将掩码注意力线性化如下：

items.en: By introducing Sisubscript𝑆𝑖S_{i} and Zisubscript𝑍𝑖Z_{i} as follows,
items.zh: 通过引入 S_i 和 Z_i 如下：

items.en: Note that, Sisubscript𝑆𝑖S_{i} and Zisubscript𝑍𝑖Z_{i} can be computed from Si−1subscript𝑆𝑖1S_{i-1} and Zi−1subscript𝑍𝑖1Z_{i-1} in constant time hence making the computational complexity of linear transformers with causal masking linear with respect to the sequence length.
items.zh: 注意，S_i 和 Z_i 可以在常数时间内从 S_{i-1} 和 Z_{i-1} 计算得出，因此使得具有因果掩码的线性 Transformer 的计算复杂度与序列长度成线性关系。

items.en: A naive implementation of equation 12, in any deep learning framework, requires storing all intermediate values Sisubscript𝑆𝑖S_{i} in order to compute the gradients. This increases the memory consumption by max⁡(D,M)𝐷𝑀\max\left(D,M\right) times; thus hindering the applicability of causal linear attention to longer sequences or deeper models. To address this, we derive the gradients of the numerator in equation 9 as cumulative sums. This allows us to compute both the forward and backward pass of causal linear attention in linear time and constant memory. A detailed derivation is provided in the supplementary material.
items.zh: 在任何深度学习框架中，方程 12 的朴素实现需要存储所有中间值 S_i 以计算梯度。这使内存消耗增加了 max(D,M) 倍；从而阻碍了因果线性注意力在更长序列或更深模型上的应用。为了解决这个问题，我们将方程 9 中分子的梯度推导为累积和。这使我们能够在线性时间和常数内存中计算因果线性注意力的前向和反向传播。详细推导见补充材料。

items.en:
Given the numerator V¯isubscript¯𝑉𝑖 ar{V}_{i} and the gradient of a scalar loss function with respect to the numerator ∇V¯iℒsubscript∇subscript¯𝑉𝑖ℒ
abla_{ ar{V}_{i}}\mathcal{L}, we derive ∇ϕ​(Qi)ℒsubscript∇italic-ϕsubscript𝑄𝑖ℒ
abla_{\phi\left(Q_{i}ight)}\mathcal{L}, ∇ϕ​(Ki)ℒsubscript∇italic-ϕsubscript𝐾𝑖ℒ
abla_{\phi\left(K_{i}ight)}\mathcal{L} and ∇Viℒsubscript∇subscript𝑉𝑖ℒ
abla_{V_{i}}\mathcal{L} as follows,
items.zh: 给定分子 V̄_i 和标量损失函数关于分子的梯度 ∇_{V̄_i} ℒ，我们推导出 ∇_{φ(Q_i)} ℒ、∇_{φ(K_i)} ℒ 和 ∇_{V_i} ℒ 如下：

items.en: The cumulative sum terms in equations 9, 13-15 are computed in linear time and require constant memory with respect to the sequence length. This results in an algorithm with computational complexity 𝒪​(N​C​M)𝒪𝑁𝐶𝑀\mathcal{O}\left(NCM\right) and memory 𝒪​(N​max⁡(C,M))𝒪𝑁𝐶𝑀\mathcal{O}\left(N\max\left(C,M\right)\right) for a given feature map of C𝐶C dimensions. A pseudocode implementation of the forward and backward pass of the numerator is given in algorithm 1.
items.zh: 公式9、13-15中的累积和项以线性时间计算，且相对于序列长度需要恒定内存。这导致算法的计算复杂度为𝒪(NCM)，内存为𝒪(N max(C, M))，其中C是特征图的维度。算法1给出了分子前向和后向传递的伪代码实现。

items.en: When training an autoregressive transformer model the full ground truth sequence is available. This makes layerwise parallelism possible both for fl​(⋅)subscript𝑓𝑙⋅f_{l}(\cdot) of equation 1 and the attention computation. As a result, transformers are more efficient to train than recurrent neural networks. On the other hand, during inference the output for timestep i𝑖i is the input for timestep i+1𝑖1i+1. This makes autoregressive models impossible to parallelize. Moreover, the cost per timestep for transformers is not constant; instead, it scales with the square of the current sequence length because attention must be computed for all previous timesteps.
items.zh: 在训练自回归Transformer模型时，完整的真实序列是可用的。这使得公式1中的f_l(·)和注意力计算都可以实现逐层并行。因此，Transformer比循环神经网络更高效地训练。另一方面，在推理过程中，时间步i的输出是时间步i+1的输入。这使得自回归模型无法并行化。此外，Transformer每个时间步的成本不是恒定的；相反，它随当前序列长度的平方缩放，因为必须为所有先前的时间步计算注意力。

items.en: Our proposed linear transformer model combines the best of both worlds. When it comes to training, the computations can be parallelized and take full advantage of GPUs or other accelerators. When it comes to inference, the cost per time and memory for one prediction is constant for our model. This means we can simply store the ϕ​(Kj)​VjTitalic-ϕsubscript𝐾𝑗superscriptsubscript𝑉𝑗𝑇\phi\left(K_{j}\right)V_{j}^{T} matrix as an internal state and update it at every time step like a recurrent neural network. This results in inference thousands of times faster than other transformer models.
items.zh: 我们提出的线性Transformer模型结合了两者的优点。在训练方面，计算可以并行化，并充分利用GPU或其他加速器。在推理方面，我们的模型每次预测的时间和内存成本是恒定的。这意味着我们可以简单地将ϕ(K_j)V_j^T矩阵存储为内部状态，并在每个时间步像循环神经网络一样更新它。这导致推理速度比其他Transformer模型快数千倍。

items.en: In literature, transformer models are considered to be a fundamentally different approach to recurrent neural networks. However, from the causal masking formulation in § 3.3 and the discussion in the previous section, it becomes evident that any transformer layer with causal masking can be written as a model that, given an input, modifies an internal state and then predicts an output, namely a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN). Note that, in contrast to Universal Transformers Dehghani et al. (2018), we consider the recurrence with respect to time and not depth.
items.zh: 在文献中，Transformer模型被认为是一种与循环神经网络根本不同的方法。然而，从§3.3中的因果掩码公式和上一节的讨论可以看出，任何具有因果掩码的Transformer层都可以写成一个模型，该模型在给定输入时修改内部状态然后预测输出，即循环神经网络（RNN）。请注意，与Universal Transformers (Dehghani et al., 2018)不同，我们考虑的是时间上的循环而非深度上的循环。

items.en: In the following equations, we formalize the transformer layer of equation 1 as a recurrent neural network. The resulting RNN has two hidden states, namely the attention memory s𝑠s and the normalizer memory z𝑧z. We use subscripts to denote the timestep in the recurrence.
items.zh: 在以下公式中，我们将公式1的Transformer层形式化为循环神经网络。得到的RNN有两个隐藏状态，即注意力记忆s和归一化器记忆z。我们使用下标表示循环中的时间步。

items.en: In the above equations, xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i} denotes the i𝑖i-th input and yisubscript𝑦𝑖y_{i} the i𝑖i-th output for a specific transformer layer. Note that our formulation does not impose any constraint on the feature function and it can be used for representing any transformer model, in theory even the ones using softmax attention. This formulation is a first step towards better understanding the relationship between transformers and popular recurrent networks Hochreiter & Schmidhuber (1997) and the processes used for storing and retrieving information.
items.zh: 在上述公式中，x_i表示第i个输入，y_i表示特定Transformer层的第i个输出。请注意，我们的公式没有对特征函数施加任何约束，它可以用于表示任何Transformer模型，理论上甚至包括使用softmax注意力的模型。这个公式是更好地理解Transformer与流行循环网络 (Hochreiter & Schmidhuber, 1997) 以及存储和检索信息过程之间关系的第一步。

items.en: In this section, we analyze experimentally the performance of the proposed linear transformer. Initially, in § 4.1, we evaluate the linearized attention in terms of computational cost, memory consumption and convergence on synthetic data. To further showcase the effectiveness of linear transformers, we evaluate our model on two real-world applications, image generation in § 4.2 and automatic speech recognition in § 4.3. We show that our model achieves competitive performance with respect to the state-of-the-art transformer architectures, while requiring significantly less GPU memory and computation.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们通过实验分析所提出的线性Transformer的性能。首先，在§4.1中，我们在合成数据上评估线性化注意力的计算成本、内存消耗和收敛性。为了进一步展示线性Transformer的有效性，我们在两个实际应用上评估我们的模型：§4.2中的图像生成和§4.3中的自动语音识别。我们表明，我们的模型在达到与最先进的Transformer架构相当的竞争性能的同时，需要显著更少的GPU内存和计算。

items.en: Throughout our experiments, we compare our model with two baselines, the full transformer with softmax attention and the Reformer Kitaev et al. (2020), the latter being a state-of-the-art accelerated transformer architecture. For the Reformer, we use a PyTorch reimplementation of the published code and for the full transformer we use the default PyTorch implementation. Note that for Reformer, we do not use the reversible layers, however, this does not affect the results as we only measure the memory consumption with respect to the self attention layer. In all experiments, we use softmax Vaswani et al. (2017) to refer to the standard transformer architecture, linear for our proposed linear transformers and lsh-X for Reformer Kitaev et al. (2020), where X denotes the hashing rounds.
items.zh: 在我们的实验中，我们将我们的模型与两个基线进行比较：具有softmax注意力的完整Transformer和Reformer (Kitaev et al., 2020)，后者是一种最先进的加速Transformer架构。对于Reformer，我们使用已发布代码的PyTorch重新实现；对于完整Transformer，我们使用默认的PyTorch实现。请注意，对于Reformer，我们不使用可逆层，但这不会影响结果，因为我们只测量与自注意力层相关的内存消耗。在所有实验中，我们使用softmax (Vaswani et al., 2017) 指代标准Transformer架构，linear指代我们提出的线性Transformer，lsh-X指代Reformer (Kitaev et al., 2020)，其中X表示哈希轮数。

items.en: For training the linear transformers, we use the feature map of equation 7. Our PyTorch Paszke et al. (2019) code with documentation and examples can be found at https://linear-transformers.com/. The constant memory gradient computation of equations 13-15 is implemented in approximately 200 lines of CUDA code.
items.zh: 为了训练线性Transformer，我们使用公式7的特征图。我们的PyTorch (Paszke et al., 2019) 代码以及文档和示例可以在 https://linear-transformers.com/ 找到。公式13-15的恒定内存梯度计算在大约200行CUDA代码中实现。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Convergence comparison of softmax, linear and reformer attention on a sequence duplication task. linear converges stably and reaches the same final performance as softmax. The details of the experiment are in § 4.1.
items.capZh: 图2：在序列复制任务上，softmax、linear和reformer注意力的收敛性比较。linear稳定收敛并达到与softmax相同的最终性能。实验细节见§4.1。

items.en: To examine the convergence properties of linear transformers we train on an artifical copy task with causal masking. Namely, the transformers have to copy a series of symbols similar to the sequence duplication task of Kitaev et al. (2020). We use a sequence of maximum length 128 with 10 different symbols separated by a dedicated separator symbol. For all three methods, we train a 4 layer transformer with 8 attention heads using a batch size of 64 and the RAdam optimizer Liu et al. (2019) with a learning rate of 10−3superscript10310^{-3} which is reduced to 10−4superscript10410^{-4} after 3000 updates. Figure 2 depicts the loss with respect to the number of gradient steps. We observe that linear converges smoothly and reaches a lower loss than lsh due to the lack of noise introduced by hashing. In particular, it reaches the same loss as softmax.
items.zh: 为了检验线性Transformer的收敛性质，我们在一个具有因果掩码的人工复制任务上进行训练。具体来说，Transformer必须复制一系列符号，类似于Kitaev等人 (2020) 的序列复制任务。我们使用最大长度为128的序列，包含10个不同的符号，由专用的分隔符分隔。对于所有三种方法，我们训练一个4层Transformer，具有8个注意力头，使用批量大小为64和RAdam优化器 (Liu et al., 2019)，学习率为10^{-3}，在3000次更新后降低到10^{-4}。图2描绘了损失相对于梯度步数的变化。我们观察到linear平滑收敛，并且由于没有哈希引入的噪声，达到了比lsh更低的损失。特别是，它达到了与softmax相同的损失。

items.en: In this subsection, we compare transformers with respect to their computational and memory requirements. We compute the attention and the gradients for a synthetic input with varying sequence lengths N∈{29,210,…,216}𝑁superscript29superscript210…superscript216N\in\{2^{9},2^{10},\dots,2^{16}\} and measure the peak allocated GPU memory and required time for each variation of transformer. We scale the batch size inversely with the sequence length and report the time and memory per sample in the batch.
items.zh: 在本小节中，我们比较Transformer在计算和内存需求方面的差异。我们计算合成输入（序列长度N∈{2^9,2^10,…,2^16}）的注意力和梯度，并测量每种Transformer变体的峰值分配GPU内存和所需时间。我们根据序列长度反比缩放批量大小，并报告批处理中每个样本的时间和内存。

items.en: Every method is evaluated up to the maximum sequence length that fits the GPU memory. For this benchmark we use an NVidia GTX 1080 Ti with 11GB of memory. This results in a maximum sequence length of 4,096 elements for softmax and 16,384 for lsh-4 and lsh-8. As expected, softmax scales quadratically with respect to the sequence length. Our method is faster and requires less memory than the baselines for every configuration, as seen in figure 1. We observe that both Reformer and linear attention scale linearly with the sequence length. Note that although the asymptotic complexity for Reformer is 𝒪​(N​log⁡N)𝒪𝑁𝑁\mathcal{O}\left(N\log N\right), log⁡N𝑁\log N is small enough and does not affect the computation time.
items.zh: 每种方法都评估到适合GPU内存的最大序列长度。对于这个基准测试，我们使用具有11GB内存的NVidia GTX 1080 Ti。这导致softmax的最大序列长度为4,096个元素，lsh-4和lsh-8为16,384个元素。正如预期，softmax相对于序列长度呈二次缩放。我们的方法比基线更快且需要更少的内存，如图1所示。我们观察到Reformer和linear注意力都随序列长度线性缩放。请注意，尽管Reformer的渐近复杂度为𝒪(N log N)，但log N足够小，不影响计算时间。

items.en: Transformers have shown great results on the task of conditional or unconditional autoregressive generation Radford et al. (2019); Child et al. (2019), however, sampling from transformers is slow due to the task being inherently sequential and the memory scaling with the square of the sequence length. In this section, we train causally masked transformers to predict images pixel by pixel. Our achieved performance in terms of bits per dimension is on par with softmax attention while being able to generate images more than 1,000 times faster and with constant memory per image from the first to the last pixel. We refer the reader to our supplementary for comparisons in terms of training evolution, quality of generated images and time to generate a single image. In addition, we also compare with a faster softmax transformer that caches the keys and values during inference, in contrast to the PyTorch implementation.
items.zh: Transformer在条件或无条件自回归生成任务上表现出色 (Radford et al., 2019; Child et al., 2019)，然而，由于任务本质上是顺序的且内存随序列长度平方缩放，从Transformer中采样很慢。在本节中，我们训练因果掩码的Transformer逐像素预测图像。我们在每维比特数方面的性能与softmax注意力相当，同时能够以超过1,000倍的速度生成图像，并且从第一个像素到最后一个像素每个图像的内存恒定。我们请读者参考我们的补充材料，以了解训练演化、生成图像质量和生成单个图像时间的比较。此外，我们还与一个更快的softmax Transformer进行比较，该Transformer在推理过程中缓存键和值，这与PyTorch实现不同。

items.en: First, we evaluate our model on image generation with autoregressive transformers on the widely used MNIST dataset LeCun et al. (2010). The architecture for this experiment comprises 8 attention layers with 8 attention heads each. We set the embedding size to 256 which is 32 dimensions per head. Our feed forward dimensions are 4 times larger than our embedding size. We model the output with a mixture of 10 logistics as introduced by Salimans et al. (2017). We use the RAdam optimizer with a learning rate of 10−4superscript10410^{-4} and train all models for 250 epochs. For the reformer baseline, we use 1 and 4 hashing rounds. Furthermore, as suggested in Kitaev et al. (2020), we use 64 buckets and chunks with approximately 32 elements. In particular, we divide the 783 long input sequence to 27 chunks of 29 elements each. Since the sequence length is realtively small, namely only 784 pixels, to remove differences due to different batch sizes we use a batch size of 10 for all methods.
items.zh: 首先，我们在广泛使用的MNIST数据集 (LeCun et al., 2010) 上使用自回归Transformer评估我们的图像生成模型。该实验的架构包括8个注意力层，每层8个注意力头。我们将嵌入大小设置为256，即每头32维。我们的前馈维度是嵌入大小的4倍。我们使用Salimans等人 (2017) 引入的10个逻辑的混合来建模输出。我们使用RAdam优化器，学习率为10^{-4}，并训练所有模型250个epoch。对于Reformer基线，我们使用1和4轮哈希。此外，如Kitaev等人 (2020) 所建议，我们使用64个桶和大约32个元素的块。具体来说，我们将长度为783的输入序列分成27个块，每个块29个元素。由于序列长度相对较小，即只有784个像素，为了消除不同批量大小带来的差异，我们对所有方法使用批量大小为10。

items.en: Image completions and unconditional samples from our MNIST model can be seen in figure 3. We observe that our linear transformer generates very convincing samples with sharp boundaries and no noise. In the case of image completion, we also observe that the transformer learns to use the same stroke style and width as the original image effectively attending over long temporal distances. Note that as the achieved perplexity is more or less the same for all models, we do not observe qualitative differences between the generated samples from different models.
items.zh: 图3显示了来自我们MNIST模型的图像补全和无条件样本。我们观察到我们的线性Transformer生成了非常令人信服的样本，边界清晰且无噪声。在图像补全的情况下，我们还观察到Transformer学会了使用与原始图像相同的笔画样式和宽度，有效地关注长时距离。请注意，由于所有模型实现的困惑度大致相同，我们没有观察到不同模型生成样本之间的定性差异。

items.en: The benefits of our linear formulation increase as the sequence length increases. To showcase that, we train 16 layer transformers to generate CIFAR-10 images Krizhevsky et al. (2009). For each layer we use the same configuration as in the previous experiment. For Reformer, we use again 64 buckets and 83 chunks of 37 elements, which is approximately 32, as suggested in the paper. Since the sequence length is almost 4 times larger than for the previous experiment, the full transformer can only be used with a batch size of 1 in the largest GPU that is available to us, namely an NVidia P40 with 24GB of memory. For both the linear transformer and reformer, we use a batch size of 4. All models are trained for 7 days. We report results in terms of bits per dimension and image generation throughput in table 2. Note that although the main point of this experiment is not the final perplexity, it is evident that as the sequence length grows, the fast transformer models become increasingly more efficient per GPU hour, achieving better scores than their slower counterparts.
items.zh: 随着序列长度的增加，我们线性公式的优势更加明显。为了展示这一点，我们训练16层Transformer生成CIFAR-10图像 (Krizhevsky et al., 2009)。每层使用与前一个实验相同的配置。对于Reformer，我们再次使用64个桶和83个块（每个块37个元素，大约32个），如论文中所建议。由于序列长度几乎是前一个实验的4倍，完整Transformer只能在我们可用的最大GPU（即具有24GB内存的NVidia P40）上使用批量大小为1。对于线性Transformer和Reformer，我们使用批量大小为4。所有模型训练7天。我们在表2中报告每维比特数和图像生成吞吐量的结果。请注意，尽管本实验的主要目的不是最终困惑度，但很明显，随着序列长度的增长，快速Transformer模型每GPU小时变得越来越高效，取得了比慢速对应模型更好的分数。

items.en: As the memory and time to generate a single pixel scales quadratically with the number of pixels for both Reformer and softmax attention, the increase in throughput for our linear transformer is even more pronounced. In particular, for every image generated by the softmax transformer, our method can generate 4,460 images. Image completions and unconditional samples from our model can be seen in figure 4. We observe that our model generates images with spatial consistency and can complete images convincigly without significantly hindering the recognition of the image category. For instance, in figure 4(b), all images have successfully completed the dog’s nose (first row) or the windshield of the truck (last row).
items.zh: 由于对于Reformer和softmax注意力，生成单个像素的内存和时间随像素数量二次缩放，我们的线性Transformer的吞吐量提升更加显著。特别是，对于softmax Transformer生成的每张图像，我们的方法可以生成4,460张图像。图4显示了来自我们模型的图像补全和无条件样本。我们观察到我们的模型生成了具有空间一致性的图像，并且可以令人信服地补全图像，而不会显著妨碍图像类别的识别。例如，在图4(b)中，所有图像都成功完成了狗的鼻子（第一行）或卡车的挡风玻璃（最后一行）。

items.en: To show that our method can also be used for non-autoregressive tasks, we evaluate the performance of linear transformers in end-to-end automatic speech recognition using Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) loss Graves et al. (2006). In this setup, we predict a distribution over phonemes for each input frame in a non autoregressive fashion. We use the 80 hour WSJ dataset Paul & Baker (1992) with 40-dimensional mel-scale filterbanks without temporal differences as features. The dataset contains sequences with 800 frames on average and a maximum sequence length of 2,400 frames. For this task, we also compare with a bidirectional LSTM Hochreiter & Schmidhuber (1997) with 3 layers of hidden size 320. We use the Adam optimizer Kingma & Ba (2014) with a learning rate of 10−3superscript10310^{-3} which is reduced when the validation error stops decreasing. For the transformer models, we use 9 layers with 6 heads with the same embedding dimensions as for the image experiments. As an optimizer, we use RAdam with an initial learning rate of 10−4superscript10410^{-4} that is divided by 2 when the validation error stops decreasing.
items.zh: 为证明我们的方法也可用于非自回归任务，我们使用连接主义时序分类（CTC）损失（Graves et al., 2006）评估线性Transformer在端到端自动语音识别中的性能。在此设置中，我们以非自回归方式为每个输入帧预测音素分布。我们使用80小时的WSJ数据集（Paul & Baker, 1992），采用40维梅尔尺度滤波器组（无时间差异）作为特征。该数据集包含平均800帧、最大序列长度2400帧的序列。对于此任务，我们还与具有3层隐藏层大小320的双向LSTM（Hochreiter & Schmidhuber, 1997）进行比较。我们使用Adam优化器（Kingma & Ba, 2014），学习率为10^{-3}，当验证误差停止下降时降低学习率。对于Transformer模型，我们使用9层6头，嵌入维度与图像实验相同。优化器使用RAdam，初始学习率为10^{-4}，当验证误差停止下降时除以2。

items.en: All models are evaluated in terms of phoneme error rate (PER) and training time per epoch. We observe that linear outperforms the recurrent network baseline and Reformer both in terms of performance and speed by a large margin, as seen in table 3. Note that the softmax transformer, achieves lower phone error rate in comparison to all baselines, but is significantly slower. In particular, linear transformer is more than 3×3\times faster per epoch. We provide training evolution plots in the supplementary.
items.zh: 所有模型均以音素错误率（PER）和每轮训练时间进行评估。我们观察到，如表3所示，线性模型在性能和速度上均大幅优于循环网络基线和Reformer。注意，softmax Transformer的音素错误率低于所有基线，但速度显著较慢。特别是，线性Transformer每轮速度快3倍以上。我们在补充材料中提供了训练演化图。

items.en: In this work, we presented linear transformer, a model that significantly reduces the memory and computational cost of the original transformers. In particular, by exploiting the associativity property of matrix products we are able to compute the self-attention in time and memory that scales linearly with respect to the sequence length. We show that our model can be used with causal masking and still retain its linear asymptotic complexities. Finally, we express the transformer model as a recurrent neural network, which allows us to perform inference on autoregressive tasks thousands of time faster.
items.zh: 在本工作中，我们提出了线性Transformer，该模型显著降低了原始Transformer的内存和计算成本。具体而言，通过利用矩阵乘积的结合律性质，我们能够以序列长度线性缩放的时间和内存计算自注意力。我们证明，我们的模型可用于因果掩码，同时保持线性渐近复杂度。最后，我们将Transformer模型表示为循环神经网络，这使得我们能够在自回归任务上以数千倍的速度进行推理。

items.en: This property opens a multitude of directions for future research regarding the storage and retrieval of information in both RNNs and transformers. Another line of research to be explored is related to the choice of feature map for linear attention. For instance, approximating the RBF kernel with random Fourier features could allow us to use models pretrained with softmax attention.
items.zh: 这一性质为未来关于RNN和Transformer中信息存储与检索的研究开辟了众多方向。另一个值得探索的研究方向与线性注意力的特征图选择有关。例如，使用随机傅里叶特征近似RBF核，可以让我们使用预训练的softmax注意力模型。

items.en: Angelos Katharopoulos was supported by the Swiss National Science Foundation under grant numbers FNS-30209 ”ISUL” and FNS-30224 ”CORTI”. Apoorv Vyas was supported by the Swiss National Science Foundation under grant number FNS-30213 ”SHISSM”. Nikolaos Pappas was supported by the Swiss National Science Foundation under grant number P400P2_183911 ”UNISON”.
items.zh: Angelos Katharopoulos 由瑞士国家科学基金会资助，项目编号 FNS-30209 "ISUL" 和 FNS-30224 "CORTI"。Apoorv Vyas 由瑞士国家科学基金会资助，项目编号 FNS-30213 "SHISSM"。Nikolaos Pappas 由瑞士国家科学基金会资助，项目编号 P400P2_183911 "UNISON"。
